title: Java Instance Main
description: Practice the compact source file and instance main method finalized in Java 25.
learningGoals: Start a program with a compact source file and an instance main method (JEP 512).
Read from and write to the console with the new java.lang.IO helper class.

completionChecks.prompt: What does this compact source file use as its entry point?
choices: A public static void main(String[] args) method
completionChecks.explanation: Java 25 compact source files can use a plain instance void main() without declaring a class.

completionChecks.prompt: Why can this lesson call IO.println without an import?
choices: IO is a method declared by every object
IO lives in java.lang, which every Java source file imports implicitly
completionChecks.explanation: Since Java 25 the IO helper class is part of java.lang, so every source file - compact or not - can call IO.println and IO.readln without an import.

completionChecks.prompt: If the user types Ada at the prompt, what prints from the IO.println call?
choices: Compilation fails because main is not static
completionChecks.explanation: The readln call supplies the input text, and a compact source file may run with an instance void main method.
